query:
INSERT INTO videos (userId, title, description, originalVideoUrl, originalVideoKey, aiModel, visibility, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 'AI Music Video', 'Neon synthwave music video generated with Sora', 'https://example.com/video1.mp4', 'video1.mp4', 'sora', 'public', NOW()),
(2, 'Face Clone Collab', 'My face cloned into a music video collaboration', 'https://example.com/video2.mp4', 'video2.mp4', 'heygen', 'public', NOW()),
(3, 'Sora Generated', 'Epic cinematic video generated with Sora API', 'https://example.com/video3.mp4', 'video3.mp4', 'sora', 'public', NOW()),
(4, 'Beat Studio Creation', 'Music production video with AI beats', 'https://example.com/video4.mp4', 'video4.mp4', 'sora', 'public', NOW()),
(5, 'Dance Challenge', 'AI-generated dance choreography video', 'https://example.com/video5.mp4', 'video5.mp4', 'sora', 'public', NOW());
